hero.title: Real-world skills, major league impact
hero.bgImageAlt: Graduate in cap and gown outdoors with palm trees in the background

intro.textBeforeHighlight: Arizona State University is proud to team up with Major League Baseball as a preferred education partner to

support.title: Supporting players on and off the field
support.description: Together, we're empowering athletes to excel in their careers and lives by offering flexible, high-quality learning opportunities in both English and Spanish. Our online programs are designed to inspire lifelong learning and help players drive meaningful change in their lives and communities.
support.imageAlt: ASU student studying on a laptop in a classroom

items.title: Accessible online learning
items.body: Our online learning platforms are designed to support demanding athletic schedules, allowing players to learn from anywhere - even while traveling or training - without compromising their professional commitments.

items.title: Same faculty, same degree
items.body: ASU's faculty are renowned research professionals and industry leaders dedicated to student success. Online students learn from the same faculty and follow the same curriculum as on-campus students.

items.title: Support for a diverse player community
items.body: Our flexible educational programs have options in both English and Spanish, ensuring every athlete can access the support and resources they need to succeed.

items.title: Inclusion through education
items.body: Rooted in ASU's charter values of inclusion, innovation and community impact, this partnership combines Major League Baseball's commitment to player development with ASU's mission to reach all learners, including non-traditional and underserved communities.

getStarted.title: How can players get started?
getStarted.body: Through this partnership, current or former MLB players can begin or continue their academic journey on a path tailored specifically to their needs. With education options in both English and Spanish, players can earn their GED or high school diploma, enhance their English language skills, complete short-form certificate programs to develop specific skills or pursue a college degree. Every player has access to a dedicated bilingual ASU success coach offering personalized support, including tailored degree plans, tutoring, cutting-edge technologies and resources.

testimonial.label: Hear from our students
testimonial.text: “The idea of going back to school after nearly 20 years was daunting. My apprehension quickly faded when I learned about ASU's dedicated support team which was designed to facilitate a smooth transition for students like me. Walking across that graduation stage was an unforgettable moment. I am immensely grateful to ASU for providing a pathway to success.”
testimonial.descriptionText: Former MLB player for the Arizona Diamondbacks, Oakland Athletics, New York Mets, New York Yankees, Boston Red Sox and Los Angeles Angels
